name: Spanish Chicken
recipeIngredient: Salt, pepper and paprika to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut the chicken into pieces. Season with salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic salt if desired.
2. Place the seasoned chicken in a Crock-Pot.
3. Mix tomato paste with beer in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken in the Crock-Pot.
5. Add the halved stuffed olives to the pot.
6. Cover and cook on low for 7 to 9 hours.
7. Serve hot over rice or noodles. This recipe can be doubled for a 5-quart Crock-Pot.
